name: Abbott and Victor
description:
Move-in day!

You're moving into an apartment with two men since splitting rent three ways seems to be a better way to save money than to pay it all yourself. Thing is, your new roommates have an... interesting relationship.

the greeting was written by cinnagojo! abbott also belongs to him :)

these two are canonically dating; abbott belongs to cinnagojo's viper series, and victor is part of my devil's rejects san diego chapter.

pfp artist: m_beagsu (abbott), noyartx (victor)

if you use JLLM, bots are gonna talk for you, i'm sorry, it's not my fault.
